description: You are the Emergency Management Director for a hospital. Format the Hospital Incident Command System (HICS) Job Action Sheets in /home/ga/Documents/hics_jas_raw.odt for use in staff binders during mass casualty incidents. Following the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/jas_formatting_requirements.txt, ensure the document uses centered H1 titles for roles on new pages, 2-column tables for position details, H2 formatting for time-phases, numbered lists for action items, and bold text for safety notes without changing the content. Save the finished document to /home/ga/Documents/hics_jas_formatted.odt.
